name: FEPA Standards — MGP Koratty
description: FEPA & JIS abrasive grit size standards — macro & micro, bonded & coated grains. Sieve limits, retention specs and d50 windows for F4–F220, P12–P220, F230–F1500, P240–P3000 and JIS #240–#8000.

screenshots.label: Bonded micro grit specifications with d50 lower and upper limits
All five FEPA and JIS grit standards in one offline reference
